# BELLE SUISSE — Premium Swiss Beauty Magazine

> BELLE SUISSE is the first digital magazine dedicated to Swiss beauty. We cover skincare, makeup, product reviews, wellness & spa, and Swiss beauty brands. Available in 5 languages: French, German, English, Italian, Russian.

## About

BELLE SUISSE covers the Swiss beauty industry with independent reviews, expert guides, and brand profiles. Our focus is on Swiss-made cosmetics and beauty products from brands like La Prairie, Valmont, Weleda, Declaré, and Mavala.

## Key Topics

- Swiss skincare and anti-aging products
- Makeup trends and tutorials
- Product reviews and comparisons (with CHF pricing)
- Swiss spas and wellness destinations
- Swiss beauty brand profiles and history
- Beauty box subscription (coming soon)

## Content Categories

- /fr/skincare — Skincare articles and guides
- /fr/maquillage — Makeup tutorials and trends
- /fr/reviews — Independent product reviews
- /fr/wellness — Spa reviews and wellness tips
- /fr/marques-suisses — Swiss brand profiles (La Prairie, Valmont, Weleda, Declaré, Mavala)
- /fr/mode — Fashion and style
- /fr/cheveux — Hair care and styling

## Languages

- French (primary): /fr/
- German: /de/
- English: /en/
- Italian: /it/
- Russian: /ru/

## Contact

- Website: https://belle-suisse.vercel.app
- Contact page: https://belle-suisse.vercel.app/fr/contact
